@AGENTS.md

## Headroom Learned Patterns
*Auto-generated by `headroom learn` on 2026-06-21 — do not edit manually*

### Large Files
*~5,000 tokens/session saved*
- `werkr-prototype.html` is 289KB (3000+ lines) — exceeds the 256KB Read limit. Never attempt a full Read. Use `grep -n '^function ' werkr-prototype.html` to locate line numbers, then read with `offset` + `limit`. For screen audits, grep for function names first.
- `app/onboarding-kyc.tsx` is ~44KB — read with offset/limit when targeting specific sections.

### Database Schema
*~3,000 tokens/session saved*
- Schema spans 12 migrations (`001_initial_schema.sql` through `012_pstTg_compliance_columns.sql`). No single file has all tables — grep across all: `grep -rn 'create table' supabase/migrations/`.
- Stripe/escrow fields (`stripe_payment_intent`, `stripe_account_id`, `escrow_captured_at`, `escrow_released_at`) are in later migrations, not `001`. `pstTg` compliance columns are in `012`.

### Design System
*~2,000 tokens/session saved*
- Color tokens in `constants/colors.ts` exported as `C`: `C.primary='#1C6B45'` (Waldgrün), `C.clay='#C4622D'` (Terrakotta), `C.primaryBg='#E9F3EE'`, `C.clayBg='#FAEAE3'`. Old `C.green` and `C.greenBg` are deprecated — replace with `C.primary`/`C.primaryBg`.
- Typography tokens in `constants/typography.ts` exported as `T`. All screens should import both `C` and `T` from `../constants/`.

### App Structure
*~800 tokens/session saved*
- Screens: `app/*.tsx`, `app/(tabs)/*.tsx`, `app/(provider)/*.tsx`. Edge Functions: `supabase/functions/*/index.ts` (stripe-webhook, create-payment-intent, release-escrow, cancel-contract). Shared logic: `lib/*.ts`.
- TypeScript check that exits clean: `npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20`.
